projectDescription: A one-click Windows optimization and debloat script suite for power users that installs essential software, removes bloatware, and configures Windows 10/11 for maximum performance.
keyFeatures: Automated software installation (7-Zip, Chrome, DirectX, VC++ runtimes)
Bloatware removal (Edge, OneDrive, UWP apps, legacy Windows features)
Windows Defender and security settings configuration
GPU driver installation with debloating for NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel
Power plan optimization with Ultimate Performance and CPU unparking
Timer resolution service for reduced input latency
Three-phase execution: initial setup → safe mode DDU → final configuration
publicApiSurface: WinSux.ps1 (main entry point — run as Administrator)
Temp/stepone.ps1 (safe mode phase — DDU driver removal + security hardening)
Temp/steptwo.ps1 (normal boot phase — final configuration + GPU driver install)
